text.title: Helm Advanced Patterns Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when in doubt about which variant to apply.

decision-tree.root-question: Do all Applies-If preconditions hold and no Skip-If trigger fires?

conclusion.verdict: do not install library chart; use as dependency only
add checksum/config annotation before next release

text.example: preconditions == false -> chart_type == library && installed_as_release == true -> has_configmap == true && checksum_annotation_missing == true -> conclusion ref.
